title: RIGHT OUTER JOIN — all rows from right side preserved
description: RIGHT OUTER JOIN — all rows from right side preserved. Key topics: RIGHT OUTER JOIN returns ALL rows from the RIGHT table, with. RIGHT JOIN is the mirror of LEFT JOIN — they produce the same. RIGHT JOIN is RARELY used in practice because LEFT JOIN reads.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆RIGHT OUTER JOIN returns ALL rows from the RIGHT table, with
◆RIGHT JOIN is the mirror of LEFT JOIN — they produce the same
◆RIGHT JOIN is RARELY used in practice because LEFT JOIN reads
◆Use RIGHT JOIN when: "Give me all bookings AND their travel
◆SAP CDS supports: LEFT OUTER JOIN, RIGHT OUTER JOIN, INNER JOIN

sections.title: Concept Diagram
sections.description:
<div class="docs-diagram"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 1800" font-family="'Ubuntu', sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr-dn" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="5" refY="10" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L5,10 L10,0 Z" fill="#64748B"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1000" height="60" fill="#E95420"/>
  <text x="500" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF">CDS Join Types — Detailed Visual Guide</text>

  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <!-- INNER JOIN -->
  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <rect x="20" y="80" width="960" height="380" rx="10" fill="#F0FDF4" stroke="#22C55E" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="20" y="80" width="960" height="36" rx="10" fill="#22C55E"/>
  <rect x="20" y="100" width="960" height="16" fill="#22C55E"/>
  <text x="40" y="104" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF">INNER JOIN</text>

  <!-- Venn diagram: A ∩ B -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="200" r="60" fill="rgba(34,197,94,0.15)" stroke="#22C55E" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="270" cy="200" r="60" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.15)" stroke="#3B82F6" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="145" y="195" font-size="11" fill="#16A34A" font-weight="bold">Table A</text>
  <text x="305" y="195" font-size="11" fill="#2563EB" font-weight="bold">Table B</text>
  <text x="230" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">ON</text>
  <text x="230" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">match</text>

  <!-- Sample data: Left table -->
  <text x="400" y="120" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#16A34A">Table A (LEFT): /dmo/travel</text>
  <rect x="400" y="128" width="270" height="80" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DCFCE7" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="146" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id  |  customer_id</text>
  <line x1="410" y1="150" x2="660" y2="150" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="165" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1  |  1001  |  100</text>
  <text x="410" y="180" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">2  |  1002  |  101</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="195" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">3  |  1003  |  102</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="210" font-size="9" fill="#64748B">4  |  9999  |  103  <-- no match in B</text>

  <!-- Sample data: Right table -->
  <text x="700" y="120" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#2563EB">Table B (RIGHT): /dmo/agency</text>
  <rect x="700" y="128" width="260" height="60" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DBEAFE" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="146" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">agency_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="710" y1="150" x2="950" y2="150" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="165" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1002  |  Happy Travel</tspan></text>
  <text x="710" y="180" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1003  |  Global Tours</tspan></text>

  <!-- Arrow -->
  <line x1="500" y1="215" x2="500" y2="235" stroke="#64748B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-dn)"/>

  <!-- Result -->
  <text x="500" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E95420">RESULT: Only rows with matching agency_id in BOTH tables</text>
  <rect x="330" y="263" width="340" height="65" rx="4" fill="#FEF2F2" stroke="#FCA5A5" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="340" y="281" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id  |  customer_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="340" y1="285" x2="660" y2="285" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="340" y="300" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">2  |  1002  |  101  |  Happy Travel</text>
  <text x="340" y="315" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">3  |  1003  |  102  |  Global Tours</text>

  <!-- CDS Syntax -->
  <rect x="40" y="340" width="920" height="55" rx="6" fill="#1E293B"/>
  <text x="60" y="358" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">define view ZV_TRAVEL_AGENCY</text>
  <text x="60" y="373" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">  as select from /dmo/travel as t</text>
  <text x="60" y="388" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">    <tspan fill="#22C55E" font-weight="bold">inner join</tspan> /dmo/agency as a on t.agency_id = a.agency_id</text>
  <text x="60" y="403" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">{ key travel_id, agency_id, customer_id, a.agency_name }</text>
  <text x="520" y="388" font-size="9" fill="#A0A0A0"><-- KEYWORD</text>

  <!-- Key insight -->
  <text x="40" y="445" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Use when you need ONLY records that exist in both sources (e.g., valid bookings with confirmed agencies).</text>
  <text x="40" y="460" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Fastest join type — smallest result set, best index usage.</text>

  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <!-- LEFT JOIN -->
  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <rect x="20" y="480" width="960" height="400" rx="10" fill="#FEFCE8" stroke="#EAB308" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="20" y="480" width="960" height="36" rx="10" fill="#EAB308"/>
  <rect x="20" y="500" width="960" height="16" fill="#EAB308"/>
  <text x="40" y="504" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF">LEFT OUTER JOIN</text>

  <!-- Venn: A ∪ (A∩B) -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="600" r="60" fill="rgba(234,179,8,0.15)" stroke="#EAB308" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="270" cy="600" r="60" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.15)" stroke="#3B82F6" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="145" y="595" font-size="11" fill="#CA8A04" font-weight="bold">Table A</text>
  <text x="305" y="595" font-size="11" fill="#2563EB" font-weight="bold">Table B</text>
  <text x="190" y="620" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">ALL A</text>
  <!-- Highlight left circle -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="600" r="62" fill="none" stroke="#E95420" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>

  <!-- Sample data: Left table -->
  <text x="400" y="520" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#CA8A04">Table A (LEFT): /dmo/travel</text>
  <rect x="400" y="528" width="270" height="80" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#FEF9C3" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="546" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id  |  customer_id</text>
  <line x1="410" y1="550" x2="660" y2="550" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="565" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1  |  1001  |  100</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="580" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">2  |  1002  |  101</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="595" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">3  |  1003  |  102</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="610" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">4  |  9999  |  103</tspan></text>

  <!-- Right table -->
  <text x="700" y="520" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#2563EB">Table B (RIGHT): /dmo/agency</text>
  <rect x="700" y="528" width="260" height="60" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DBEAFE" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="546" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">agency_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="710" y1="550" x2="950" y2="550" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="565" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1001  |  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">Premier Agency</tspan></text>
  <text x="710" y="580" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1002  |  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">Happy Travel</tspan></text>

  <!-- Arrow -->
  <line x1="500" y1="615" x2="500" y2="635" stroke="#64748B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-dn)"/>

  <!-- Result -->
  <text x="500" y="655" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E95420">RESULT: ALL rows from A — B columns are NULL where no match</text>
  <rect x="280" y="663" width="440" height="80" rx="4" fill="#FEF2F2" stroke="#FCA5A5" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="290" y="681" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id  |  customer_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="290" y1="685" x2="710" y2="685" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="290" y="700" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1  |  1001  |  100  |  Premier Agency     ← matched</text>
  <text x="290" y="715" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">2  |  1002  |  101  |  Happy Travel       ← matched</text>
  <text x="290" y="730" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">3  |  1003  |  102  |  Global Tours       ← matched</text>
  <text x="290" y="745" font-size="9" fill="#DC2626" font-weight="bold">4  |  9999  |  103  |  NULL               ← NO match in B!</text>

  <!-- CDS Syntax -->
  <rect x="40" y="755" width="920" height="55" rx="6" fill="#1E293B"/>
  <text x="60" y="773" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">define view ZV_TRAVEL_WITH_AGENCY</text>
  <text x="60" y="788" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">  as select from /dmo/travel as t</text>
  <text x="60" y="803" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">    <tspan fill="#EAB308" font-weight="bold">left outer join</tspan> /dmo/agency as a on t.agency_id = a.agency_id</text>
  <text x="60" y="818" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">{ key travel_id, a.agency_name }  --> a.agency_name is NULL when no match</text>

  <text x="40" y="865" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Use when you need ALL rows from the left table regardless of whether a match exists on the right.</text>
  <text x="40" y="880" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Right table columns show NULL where there is no matching row — handle with COALESCE in production code.</text>

  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <!-- RIGHT JOIN -->
  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <rect x="20" y="900" width="960" height="400" rx="10" fill="#FEF2F2" stroke="#EF4444" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="20" y="900" width="960" height="36" rx="10" fill="#EF4444"/>
  <rect x="20" y="920" width="960" height="16" fill="#EF4444"/>
  <text x="40" y="924" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF">RIGHT OUTER JOIN</text>

  <!-- Highlight right circle -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="1020" r="60" fill="rgba(239,68,68,0.15)" stroke="#EF4444" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="270" cy="1020" r="60" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.15)" stroke="#3B82F6" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="145" y="1015" font-size="11" fill="#DC2626" font-weight="bold">Table A</text>
  <text x="305" y="1015" font-size="11" fill="#2563EB" font-weight="bold">Table B</text>
  <text x="270" y="1040" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">ALL B</text>
  <circle cx="270" cy="1020" r="62" fill="none" stroke="#E95420" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>

  <!-- Sample data: Left table -->
  <text x="400" y="940" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#DC2626">Table A (LEFT): /dmo/travel</text>
  <rect x="400" y="948" width="270" height="60" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#FEE2E2" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="966" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id</text>
  <line x1="410" y1="970" x2="660" y2="970" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="410" y="985" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1  |  1001</tspan></text>
  <text x="410" y="1000" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">2  |  1002</tspan></text>

  <!-- Right table -->
  <text x="700" y="940" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#2563EB">Table B (RIGHT): /dmo/agency</text>
  <rect x="700" y="948" width="260" height="80" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DBEAFE" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="966" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">agency_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="710" y1="970" x2="950" y2="970" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="710" y="985" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1001  |  Premier</tspan></text>
  <text x="710" y="1000" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1002  |  Happy Travel</tspan></text>
  <text x="710" y="1015" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">  <tspan fill="#E95420" font-weight="bold">1003  |  Global Tours</tspan></text>

  <!-- Arrow -->
  <line x1="500" y1="1035" x2="500" y2="1055" stroke="#64748B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-dn)"/>

  <!-- Result -->
  <text x="500" y="1075" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E95420">RESULT: ALL rows from B — A columns are NULL where no match</text>
  <rect x="280" y="1083" width="440" height="80" rx="4" fill="#FEF2F2" stroke="#FCA5A5" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="290" y="1101" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">travel_id  |  agency_id  |  customer_id  |  agency_name</text>
  <line x1="290" y1="1105" x2="710" y2="1105" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="290" y="1120" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1  |  1001  |  100  |  Premier             ← matched</text>
  <text x="290" y="1135" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">2  |  1002  |  101  |  Happy Travel        ← matched</text>
  <text x="290" y="1150" font-size="9" fill="#DC2626" font-weight="bold">NULL  |  1003  |  NULL  |  Global Tours       ← NO match in A!</text>

  <!-- CDS Syntax -->
  <rect x="40" y="1175" width="920" height="55" rx="6" fill="#1E293B"/>
  <text x="60" y="1193" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">define view ZV_AGENCY_WITH_TRAVEL</text>
  <text x="60" y="1208" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">  as select from /dmo/travel as t</text>
  <text x="60" y="1223" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">    <tspan fill="#EF4444" font-weight="bold">right outer join</tspan> /dmo/agency as a on t.agency_id = a.agency_id</text>
  <text x="60" y="1238" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">{ key travel_id, a.agency_id, agency_name }  --> travel_id is NULL when no match</text>

  <text x="40" y="1285" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Mirror of LEFT JOIN — all rows from the RIGHT table are preserved, left side gets NULLs.</text>
  <text x="40" y="1300" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Less common in CDS — typically you swap the tables and use LEFT JOIN for readability.</text>

  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <!-- CROSS JOIN -->
  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <rect x="20" y="1320" width="960" height="450" rx="10" fill="#EDE9FE" stroke="#A855F7" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="20" y="1320" width="960" height="36" rx="10" fill="#A855F7"/>
  <rect x="20" y="1340" width="960" height="16" fill="#A855F7"/>
  <text x="40" y="1344" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF">CROSS JOIN (Cartesian Product)</text>

  <!-- Visual: all pairs -->
  <rect x="40" y="1370" width="920" height="160" rx="8" fill="#F5F3FF" stroke="#DDD6FE" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Table A -->
  <text x="100" y="1395" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#9333EA">Table A: Colors</text>
  <rect x="60" y="1405" width="100" height="110" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DDD6FE" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="70" y="1423" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">id  |  color</text>
  <line x1="70" y1="1427" x2="150" y2="1427" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="70" y="1442" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1  |  Red</text>
  <text x="70" y="1457" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">2  |  Blue</text>
  <text x="70" y="1472" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">3  |  Green</text>

  <!-- Table B -->
  <text x="360" y="1395" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#2563EB">Table B: Sizes</text>
  <rect x="320" y="1405" width="100" height="90" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#DBEAFE" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="330" y="1423" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">id  |  size</text>
  <line x1="330" y1="1427" x2="410" y2="1427" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="330" y="1442" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">1  |  S</text>
  <text x="330" y="1457" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">2  |  M</text>

  <!-- Cross marker -->
  <text x="260" y="1470" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" font-weight="bold" fill="#A855F7">×</text>

  <!-- Result -->
  <text x="660" y="1395" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E95420">Result (3 × 2 = 6 rows)</text>
  <rect x="560" y="1405" width="220" height="120" rx="4" fill="#FEF2F2" stroke="#FCA5A5" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="570" y="1423" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#64748B">color  |  size</text>
  <line x1="570" y1="1427" x2="770" y2="1427" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="570" y="1442" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Red    |  S</text>
  <text x="570" y="1457" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Red    |  M</text>
  <text x="570" y="1472" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Blue   |  S</text>
  <text x="570" y="1487" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Blue   |  M</text>
  <text x="570" y="1502" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Green  |  S</text>
  <text x="570" y="1517" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b">Green  |  M</text>

  <!-- CDS Syntax -->
  <rect x="40" y="1545" width="920" height="70" rx="6" fill="#1E293B"/>
  <text x="60" y="1563" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">define view ZV_COLOR_SIZE</text>
  <text x="60" y="1578" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">  as select from colors   <tspan fill="#64748B">-- no ON condition!</tspan></text>
  <text x="60" y="1593" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">    <tspan fill="#A855F7" font-weight="bold">cross join</tspan> sizes</text>
  <text x="60" y="1608" font-size="10" fill="#A0A0A0">{ color, size }</text>

  <text x="40" y="1640" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Every row from A paired with every row from B — no ON condition, no filter.</text>
  <text x="40" y="1655" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ Result size = N(A) × N(B). Use with date dimensions, number ranges, or small reference tables.</text>
  <text x="40" y="1670" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">▸ ⚠ DANGER: Joining two large tables (10K × 10K = 100M rows) will crash the HANA compiler.</text>

  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <!-- COMPARISON SUMMARY -->
  <!-- ================================================================== -->
  <rect x="20" y="1795" width="960" height="130" rx="10" fill="#F8FAFC" stroke="#CBD5E1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="500" y="1820" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1e293b">Quick Reference</text>
  <line x1="40" y1="1830" x2="960" y2="1830" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1"/>

  <text x="60" y="1852" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#16A34A">INNER</text>
  <text x="150" y="1852" font-size="10" fill="#1e293b">Only matching rows from both sides</text>
  <text x="480" y="1852" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">Best performance, smallest result</text>

  <text x="60" y="1872" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#CA8A04">LEFT</text>
  <text x="150" y="1872" font-size="10" fill="#1e293b">All rows from LEFT table + matched right columns</text>
  <text x="480" y="1872" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">Good — left table drives cardinality</text>

  <text x="60" y="1892" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#DC2626">RIGHT</text>
  <text x="150" y="1892" font-size="10" fill="#1e293b">All rows from RIGHT table + matched left columns</text>
  <text x="480" y="1892" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">Same as LEFT (swap tables instead)</text>

  <text x="60" y="1912" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#9333EA">CROSS</text>
  <text x="150" y="1912" font-size="10" fill="#1e293b">Every combination — Cartesian product</text>
  <text x="480" y="1912" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">⚠ Slow — N×M rows</text>
<text x="10" y="20" font-size="8" fill="rgba(233,84,32,0.15)" font-family="sans-serif">cds-bytes (c) 2026</text></svg></div>

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆RIGHT OUTER JOIN returns ALL rows from the RIGHT table, with
◆RIGHT JOIN is the mirror of LEFT JOIN — they produce the same
◆RIGHT JOIN is RARELY used in practice because LEFT JOIN reads
◆Use RIGHT JOIN when: "Give me all bookings AND their travel
◆SAP CDS supports: LEFT OUTER JOIN, RIGHT OUTER JOIN, INNER JOIN

Concept Diagram

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_RIGHT_J'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - RIGHT OUTER JOIN (Booking preserved)'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_RIGHT_JOIN
  as select from /DMO/I_Travel_D as _Travel

    /*
     * RIGHT OUTER JOIN:
     *   All BOOKINGS are returned even if no matching Travel exists.
     *   This is the mirror of LEFT OUTER JOIN — same result as:
     *     LEFT JOIN on _Booking → _Travel with tables swapped.
     */
    right outer join /DMO/I_Booking_D as _Booking
      on _Travel.TravelUUID = _Booking.TravelUUID

{
  /* Keys */
  key _Booking.BookingUUID,

  /* Booking fields (always present — right side is preserved) */
      _Booking.BookingID,
      @Semantics.date: true
      _Booking.BookingDate,
      _Booking.BookingStatus,
      _Booking.AirlineID,
      @Semantics.date: true
      _Booking.FlightDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BookingCurrency'
      _Booking.FlightPrice,
      _Booking.CurrencyCode               as BookingCurrency,

  /* Travel fields (may be NULL if no matching travel exists) */
      coalesce(_Travel.TravelID, '')      as TravelID,
      coalesce(_Travel.AgencyID, '')      as AgencyID,
      coalesce(_Travel.CustomerID, '')    as CustomerID,
      @Semantics.date: true
      _Travel.BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      _Travel.EndDate,
      _Travel.Description,
      _Travel.TotalPrice,
      _Travel.BookingFee
}
details:
matching data from the LEFT when available (otherwise NULLs)

result if you swap the table order

more naturally: "From this main table, join that related table"

info if the travel exists" (Bookings as the primary entity)

LEFT vs RIGHT vs INNER:

INNER JOIN → Only matching: Travel A + Booking A

LEFT JOIN → ALL Travel: Travel A + Booking A, Travel B + NULL

RIGHT JOIN → ALL Booking: Travel A + Booking A, NULL + Booking C

DIAGRAM: assets/diagrams/join-types.svg
topic: RIGHT OUTER JOIN — mirror of LEFT JOIN (less common)
